page_title: EVANGELION series in Super Robot Wars
text:
is a series of Japanese tactical role-playing video games produced by , formerly Banpresto. This article will dwelve in the participation of EVANGELION franchise in the SRW series.

List of Games

Super Robot Wars F (1997)

 was released on 25 December 1997 for Sega Saturn and on 10 December 1998 for PlayStation.

Neon Genesis Evangelion (Debut)
Evangelion Unit-01 (Debut)

Super Robot Wars F Final (1998)

 was released on 23 April 1998 for Sega Saturn and 15 April 1999 for PlayStation.

Neon Genesis Evangelion
Evangelion Unit-01
Evangelion Unit-02 (Debut)
Evangelion Unit-03 (Debut)

Super Robot Wars α (2000)

 was released on 25 May 2000 for PlayStation.

Neon Genesis Evangelion
The End of Evangelion (Debut)

Super Robot Pinball (2001)

 was released on 23 February 2001 for Game Boy Color.
Neon Genesis Evangelion

Super Robot Wars α for Dreamcast (2001)

 was released on 30 August 2001 for Dreamcast.

Neon Genesis Evangelion
The End of Evangelion

Super Robot Wars Scramble Commander (2003)

 was released on 06 November 2003 for PlayStation 2.

Neon Genesis Evangelion
The End of Evangelion

Super Robot Wars MX (2004)

 was released on 27 May 2004 for PlayStation 2.

Neon Genesis Evangelion
The End of Evangelion

Super Robot Wars Alpha 3: To the End of the Galaxy (2005)

 was released on 28 July 28, 2005 and 08 June 2006 (PlayStation 2 the best version) for PlayStation 2.

Neon Genesis Evangelion
The End of Evangelion

Super Robot Wars MX Portable (2005)

 was released on 29 December 2005 for PlayStation Portable.

Neon Genesis Evangelion
The End of Evangelion

Super Robot Wars L (2010)

 was released on 25 November 2010 for Nintendo DS.

Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone (Debut)
Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance (Debut)

Super Robot Wars Card Chronicle (2012)

 was released on 13 September 2012 for mobile phones.

Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone

Super Robot Wars Z III Jigoku-hen (2014)

 was released on 10 April 2014 for PlayStation 3, PlayStation VITA and PlayStation VITA TV.

Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone
Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance

Super Robot Wars Z III Tengoku-hen (2015)

 was released on 02 April 2015 for PlayStation 3, PlayStation VITA and PlayStation VITA TV.

Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone
Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance
Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo (Debut)

Super Robot Wars X-Ω (2015)

 was released on 05 October 2015 for App Store and Google Play.

Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone
Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance
GODZILLA vs EVANGELION (Debut)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA (Debut)

Super Robot Wars V (2017)

 was released on 02 April 2017 for PlayStation 4, PlayStation VITA, Nintendo Switch and Steam.

Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone
Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance
Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo

Super Robot Wars DD (2019)

 was released on 21 August 2019 for App Store and Google Play.

Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone
Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance
Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo
